---
# title 是主页的页面标题和浏览器标题。
title: "Xingjian Zhou"
# subtitle 在姓名下方标明主要研究方向。
subtitle: "Geometric Analysis"
# full 布局允许主页欢迎区域使用更宽的页面空间。
page-layout: full
# 主页内容较短，因此关闭本页目录。
toc: false
---

<!-- hero 类把这一整块内容显示成 styles.css 中定义的欢迎卡片。 -->
::: {.hero}
## Welcome

I am a Ph.D. student in mathematics at **Xiamen University** and a joint Ph.D. student at the **University of Trento**. My research lies in **geometric analysis**, especially geometric inequalities and monotonicity formulas arising from elliptic partial differential equations.

This website collects my research, publications, curriculum vitae, and mathematical notes.

<!-- .btn 创建按钮外形；primary 是实心主按钮，outline-primary 是描边次按钮。 -->
[Read my notes](notes/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary} [View publications](publications.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
<!-- 三个冒号结束上面开始的 hero 内容容器。 -->
:::

## Research Interests

- Potential theory and nonlinear elliptic/parabolic PDEs
- Inverse mean curvature flow and minimal surfaces
- Scalar curvature, rigidity, and the Penrose inequality

## Research

My current work focuses on scalar curvature problems, rigidity phenomena, and analytic aspects of the Penrose inequality. See the dedicated [Publications](publications.qmd) page for my peer-reviewed articles and current preprints.

[View all publications](publications.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary} [View my CV](cv.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

## Contact

[zhouxingjian@stu.xmu.edu.cn](mailto:zhouxingjian@stu.xmu.edu.cn)<br>
Xiamen University / University of Trento

[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0004-9761-5438){.btn .btn-outline-primary} [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=hSVmSnAAAAAJ&hl=en){.btn .btn-outline-primary} [GitHub](https://github.com/XingjianZhouMath){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
